title: Merge: Autoresearch/mar28 experiments on 4xH20
author: demouo
body:
checkpoint: mar28 experiment results on 4xH20

50 experiments tracked (best val_bpb=1.1978).
Typical run: ~2200-2600 steps, ~264ms/step avg.
Key progression: baseline 1.2806 → MHA+TTT 1.1990.

Core improvements (in chronological order):
    - Optimizer: Muon weight decay=0.04, momentum=0.99, warmdown schedule
    - INT6 quantization: mixed-precision int6 to fit artifact under 16MB
    - Sliding window eval (stride=64): 1.2806 → 1.2449 (+2.8%)
    - EMA weight averaging (decay=0.995~0.997): 1.2449 → 1.2391
    - Architecture: MLP width 3x→3.5x, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation
    - BigramHash4096: character bigram hash embeddings, 1.2327 → 1.2289
    - zstd-22 compression: artifact size -0.5MB
    - Sequence packing 8192: longer context, 7L, 1.2280 → 1.2162
    - LR/warmdown tuning: matrix_lr=0.06, warmdown=4000, 1.2162 → 1.2076
    - MLP4x (no bigram, larger MLP trades off bigram): 1.2076 → 1.2047
    - MHA (full multi-head attention, 8 KV heads): 1.2047 → 1.2021
    - TTT (test-time training, chunk=65536): 1.2021 → 1.1990
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
